posts.text: Heartbreaking news from @BenSasse. Praying for a miracle for a man of such courage, devotion and faith.
We’ve reached a point where any mix of solutions to our nation’s economic problems is going to involve the wealthiest Americans contributing more. nytimes.com/2025/12/19/opini…

Clouded in grief with Providence, Sydney and LA, but rays of thankfulness for the hero at Bondi, and in Hollywood for the genius who gave us “inconceivable, does anyone want a peanut, only mostly dead, rodents of unusual size, and…as you wish.”
Tragedy in Michigan as my brothers and sisters and their church are targets of violence. Praying for healing and comforting.

President Russell M. Nelson will be known for the scores of new temples, accelerating the growth of the Church, centering the gospel in the home, his prophetic words and his love for Jesus Christ, but for Ann and me, one thing touched us most personally and profoundly: his kindness.

The shooting of Charlie Kirk has shocked and sickened me and my family. We extend our prayers and profound sorrow to Charlie and his family, many friends and followers. Another senseless act of violence appalls us.

I am a true-blue member of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. Ann and I attend sacrament meeting every Sunday and enjoy service in the temple. We love our church and the callings we have received in our home ward. A poorly sourced article in the @sltrib that said otherwise is laughable. By the way, if you’d like to learn more about my religion, I’d be happy to help you meet with our missionaries—including some of my grandchildren!
Thinking of President Biden and his family. Ann and I send our prayers for healing.
The world has been blessed by the voice and example of Pope Francis. May Pope Leo XIV likewise draw upon the best of humankind and lead toward the Savior, Jesus Christ.

Heavy heart with the passing of my friend and colleague, Mia Love. Her energy, enthusiasm and wit made her a stand-out member of Congress. Her faith and fortitude made her a model for me and for countless others. We will dearly miss you, Mia.

All know that a strong America is the best ally of peace—the world’s avaricious dictators of Russia, China, North Korea and Iran are hesitant to invade and brutalize in the face of 1) American strength and 2) American resolve. Our tepid response to Russia’s invasion of Georgia and Crimea surely contributed to Putin’s decision to invade Ukraine. 

American strength is greatest when we have friends that stand with us; we must not let economic squabbles fray the bonds of our alliances. 
American re

Congratulations to Utah’s newest senator—@RepJohnCurtis! Our state is fortunate to have your continued service in Washington and the Senate is fortunate to have you. Wishing you and your team much success.

A man of character and deep faith, Jimmy Carter will be remembered as more than a president. He leaves behind a legacy of service to others, love of family, and devotion to country and democracy. He is home again, reunited with his beloved wife, Rosalynn.
What does President Trump want Republicans to do: vote for the CR or shut down government? Absent direction, confusion reigns.

A country’s character is a reflection not just of its elected officials but also of its people. I leave Washington to return to be one among them and hope to be a voice of unity and virtue.

Video
Senator-elect @DaveMcCormickPA should obviously be invited to attend freshman senator orientation. The race has been called and he should be able to join his colleagues.
